Class Slavers

java.lang.Object
Model.Board.AdventureCards.AdventureCardFilip
Model.Board.AdventureCards.Enemy<CrewPenalty,Credits>
Model.Board.AdventureCards.Slavers
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Cloneable
public class Slavers extends Enemy<CrewPenalty,Credits>
Represents a slavers encounter card in the game. This card has a crew penalty for losing, a reward in credits for winning, and a days penalty for winning.
See Also:
